历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 1912 → 3134 → 4955 → 3375 → 4428, showing an overall backward trend (increasing numbers). From 2021 to 2023, it continuously shifted backward by about 3043 places. In 2024, it briefly rebounded to 3375, and in 2025, it shifted backward again to 4428. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4428, with a fluctuation range of about 1580 places over the past three years, indicating significant volatility. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Jilin Province: 55 in 2021, 62 in 2022, 67 in 2023, 64 in 2024, and 68 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 63, a decrease of 5 from 2025 (a reduction of about 7.35%), which is a moderate reduction that will slightly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 19th (Top 20) in the 2026 main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking around 19th in recent years, belonging to the top comprehensive universities in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving responses to school management, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with medium to high short video exposure. In 2022, Jiangxi Province experienced a significant drop in the admission line ranking, but this is an isolated provincial phenomenon with limited impact on Jilin Province. Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Geography A+, Marxist Theory A+, Mathematics A, Statistics A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Ecology A, Foreign Language and Literature A, etc., with 18 disciplines rated A- or above, indicating top-tier disciplinary strength, which strongly attracts science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Computer Science was recommended, significantly cooling down from the high recommendation in 2023 but still relatively hot. Electronics/Communication is highly recommended (76.86). Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended (74.28). Teacher Training/Education is divided and wait-and-see (55.84). The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Jilin Province is approximately 110,868, with an estimated 80,000 in the Physics category based on recent proportions, roughly the same as 2025 (80,400). Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application. The university's enrollment scale in the science group in Jilin Province is medium (68 in 2025), with no special local regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings (from 1912 in 2021 to 4428 in 2025, a cumulative backward shift of about 2516 places), the slight reduction of 7.35% in the 2026 science group enrollment plan (slightly intensifying competition), the top-tier school level and numerous advantageous disciplines strongly attracting candidates, and the basically stable number of candidates in Jilin Province, based on the 2025 baseline of 4428, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4283, with a range of 3783–4783.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3783–4783, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3783), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors such as the Li Yun Experimental Class and the Psychology Joint Degree Program. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 4783), it is recommended to choose Tier 3 majors such as Public Administration, Accounting, and Financial Technology as the main options, while also considering Tier 2 majors like Chemistry and Geographical Sciences.
